case_number: Criminal Transfer Application No. D-01 of 2025

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Transfer Application No. D-01 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of M.A No.2638/ 2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 27.01.2026 Mir Waseem Abbas Talpur advocate for the applicant. Mr. Neel Parkash, D.P.G. = Learned counsel for the applicant states that the transfer has been sought in a matter, which has already been decided and judgment has been passed, therefore, instant transfer application has become infructuous, hence he does not press the same. Accordingly, instant Transfer application alongwith listed application is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE “Saleem”
